title: ValueTracking: Improve sign bit handling for fdiv
author: arsenm
description:
This is the fdiv version of 5020e0ff1494137ff12b4ed7c8fa896f8088b17b for
fmul.

tests.test_body:
define float @ret_fdiv_both_signs_negative_or_nan(float %lhs, float %rhs) {
  %lhs.fabs = call float @llvm.fabs.f32(float %lhs)
  %rhs.fabs = call float @llvm.fabs.f32(float %rhs)
  %lhs.neg.fabs = fneg float %lhs.fabs
  %rhs.neg.fabs = fneg float %rhs.fabs
  %mul = fdiv float %lhs.neg.fabs, %rhs.neg.fabs
  ret float %mul
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare float @llvm.fabs.f32(float) #0

attributes #0 = { nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }
